name: Scalloped Turkey & Cauliflower
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Whole wheat or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cauliflower in boiling, salted water for 6 minutes or until almost tender.
2. Drain the cauliflower.
3. Combine stock, flour and seasonings in a small saucepan. Cook and stir until mixture is slightly thickened.
4. Place turkey breast in a greased baking pan. Arrange cauliflower around the turkey breast.
5. Pour sauce over turkey and cauliflower.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
4 servings, each 112 calories; 1 med-fat meat; 1 vegetable exchange
Source: Diabetic High Fiber Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand c. 1985 Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier Oct 93
